title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Imperial Logistics India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Imperial Logistics India
jsonLd.description:
Imperial Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Kolkata location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Imperial Logistics India:
Imperial Logistics India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Imperial Logistics India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
